## Summary

## Testing

- [ ] `make check` (build + ctest)
- [ ] `make test TEST=test_embed` / `test_search` (if the embed or search path changed and ONNX model is available)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior changed (TDD: test first)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed (`README`, `core/docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Public API / `codeberg.h` changes are intentional and documented
- [ ] No secrets (API keys, PATs) committed
